_description: Baseline of starter equipment and inventory for every concrete creature template in res/config/monsters.json. Equipped maps a slot id to a single item typeId; inventory maps an item typeId to its multiplicity (count). This baseline protects the rule that starter gear stays attached to the concrete creature/player-class templates (not moved into class definitions) and that each item is attached exactly once. Player-class templates (class CPlayer) carry the starter gear; concrete CCreature monster templates currently carry no equipment or inventory. Regenerated and verified by tests/test_creature_equipment_inventory_baseline.py against the authoritative config.
